pi_items.source: task.json instructions and setup_task.sh deletion of existing folder
task.json instructions and setup_task.sh injecting synthetic emails with 'Project Alpha' in subject

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 5 synthetic emails injected into the Thunderbird Inbox, each containing 'Project Alpha' in the subject line. The required folder to be created is 'ProjectAlpha'. The filter must be named 'Project Alpha Filter' and target the subject line 'Project Alpha'.
